node.definition: Continuous predictions are trained by penalizing distance from numerical targets.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Regression losses (MSE, MAE, robust) is modeled as depending on Supervised learning, Statistics & experimental design and feeding downstream nodes such as Linear models & generalized linear models, Decision trees, random forests & boosted trees.

limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Statistics & experimental design.
